message:
Those swiveling ears aren't just cute — they're high-tech. 🐶📡 A dog's ears are powered by more than 18 muscles (we humans have just 6!), letting them rotate like little satellite dishes to pinpoint exactly where a sound is coming from. And they can catch that sound from about four times farther away than you can, picking up high pitches your ears can't even register. So the next time your pup perks up at "nothing"… trust me, it's definitely something. 👂

Comment 🐾 if your dog hears the treat bag open from three rooms away!
